text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Groove, about the tea you shared
with me yesterday…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What is it? Did it not suit your tastes?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, quite the opposite! I was wondering
if you could tell me the brand so I can buy
some more.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you enjoyed it, but unfortunately
it is not something you can purchase.
That tea was made with chamomile flowers
I grew myself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yourself?! Oh my, I received quite
the valuable gift.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then may I ask for some more to send
to my family? They love all kinds of tea!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
N-Now wait just a moment!
I'm afraid I can't allow you to do that!!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your family's thank-you gifts always
completely fill up my room. I end up
with no place to sleep!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah… Yes, I can see that. They do tend to go
a bit overboard expressing their gratitude.
